aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a good foundation for AEO with a clear service focus and some technical optimizations, but lacks comprehensive content and user engagement strategies.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews.
Expand website content to include detailed service pages and location-specific keywords.
Enhance metadata with targeted keywords and location information.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has basic local business schema but lacks comprehensive GBP optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged Google Business Profile (GBP) opportunities, which are crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP listing found, indicating a missed opportunity for local search presence.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks widespread citations across directories.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive local SEO strategy and GBP optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local heat pump installation services in Westminster, Colorado.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Claim and optimize Google Business Profile and build local citations.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, locally-focused content and engage with local community events or partnerships to build authority.
